codeReview.summary: Employee/leave redesign is implemented with concrete domain, service, controller, migration, and test coverage changes. Employee payroll profile fields, salary template assignment, leave policy/balance tracking, leave approval metadata, and attendance bulk/import/monthly summary flows are present and validated by dedicated HR service tests plus runtime guardrails.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission currently relies on flyway-v2 by default for prod profile, which means new payroll schema fields must be added to migration_v2 (not only v1 migration chain) to keep codered/integration suites representative.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: application.yml groups prod -> flyway-v2 and application-flyway-v2.yml points Flyway to db/migration_v2; codered payroll test failures reported schema drift in v2 path.

summary: Pass. HR employee and leave redesign behavior aligns with milestone expectations and is backed by focused tests.
